Now Live Across Campus

Delivering Anything
Across Campus,
Instantly.

Knock Knock is the intra-campus delivery platform that connects students to food, essentials, and more — delivered to your doorstep in minutes.

🧑‍🎓
👩‍💻
🧑‍🔬
👩‍🎨

5,000+ students already onboard

ABOUT US

What is Knock Knock?

Knock Knock is an intra-campus delivery platform built exclusively for students. We bridge the gap between campus vendors and student residences — so you can get your food, stationery, medicines, and daily essentials without leaving your room.

🚀
Built for Students
Designed around campus life — fast, affordable, and always available.
🔗
Vendor Network
Integrated with all campus-approved vendors and canteens.
📍
Hyper-Local
100% within campus. No delivery zone confusion, ever.
FEATURES

Everything you need,
delivered.

A complete platform built around the unique needs of campus living.

Lightning Fast

Deliveries completed in under 20 minutes across the entire campus network.

Easy Ordering

Browse, tap, and order. A frictionless experience built for students on the go.

Campus-Wide Coverage

Every hostel, building, and corner of campus is within our delivery radius.

Vendor Integration

Seamlessly connected to canteens, shops, and on-campus vendors.

Real-Time Tracking

Track your delivery live on a map — always know exactly where your order is.

Safe & Secure

Verified delivery partners and contactless handoffs for a safe experience.

HOW IT WORKS

Four steps to your door.

From order to delivery — a seamless, end-to-end experience.

📱
Place Order
Student orders via app
1
↓
🍱
Vendor Prepares
Vendor gets notified
2
↓
🛵
Partner Picks Up
Delivery partner assigned
3
↓
🏠
Delivered!
Right at your doorstep
4

FOUNDER

The story behind Knock Knock.

👨‍💼
Founder
Knock Knock India

Building the future of campus logistics.

🚀

Founded and scaled an intra-campus delivery platform serving 5,000+ students across college campuses.

📈

Acquired 1,500+ active users within 90 days through targeted outreach and viral referral campaigns.

⚙️

Designed end-to-end delivery workflows and vendor coordination systems achieving a 98% on-time delivery rate.

🇮🇳 IndiaCampus TechEdTech Logistics
TESTIMONIALS

Loved by students.

"Knock Knock is a lifesaver! I got my lunch delivered right to my hostel during a hectic exam week. Super fast and reliable."
